description: Stores supplier invoice line information including item, tax, freight, and miscellaneous line details.

columns.name: LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Type of invoice line such as ITEM, TAX, FREIGHT, or MISCELLANEOUS.

columns.name: ACCOUNTING_DATE
columns.description: Accounting date for the invoice line.

columns.name: PO_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Purchase Order header associated with the invoice line.

columns.name: PO_LINE_ID
columns.description: Purchase Order line associated with the invoice line.

columns.name: PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
columns.description: Purchase Order distribution associated with the invoice line.

columns.name: UNIT_PRICE
columns.description: Unit price of the invoice line.

business_questions: Show invoice line details for an invoice
List item lines for a supplier invoice
Find invoice lines matched to purchase orders
Display invoice line quantities and unit prices
List invoice lines for a purchase order
